billView.title: i-invoyisi
billView.invalidId: I-ID ye-invoyisi ayivumelekile noma ayikho. Qiniseka ukuthi isixhumanisi silungile.
billView.loadError: Kwenzeke iphutha ekulayisheni i-invoyisi. Qiniseka ukuthi uxhumeke kuseva noma uzame futhi ngemva kwesikhathi.

errors.NOT_VERIFIED: I-akhawunti ayenziwa isebenze. Sicela uvule i-imeyili yakho kuqala.
errors.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED: Umlayezo wokwenza kusebenze awuthunyelwanga. Sicela uhlole ikheli lakho le-imeyili noma uzame futhi ngemva kwesikhathi.
errors.ALREADY_VERIFIED: I-akhawunti isivele yenziwe yasebenza. Manje ungangena.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Isixhumanisi siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ucele isixhumanisi esisha.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Isikhathi siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ungene futhi.
errors.INVALID_CONTROLLER_COUNT: Inombolo yezihlangu kufanele ibe phakathi kuka-1 no-4.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Ayikwazi ukuxhuma kuseva. Qiniseka ukuthi iseva iyasebenza nokuthi unoxhumo lwe-inthanethi.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Kwenzeke iphutha leseva. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
